title: pelargonium × nubilum
intro: Pelargonium × nubilum, also known as the Cape Rose or White Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × nubilum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
